metadata.title: Onye Emepụta Paleti Agba n'efu – Paleti 9 Site n'Otu Agba
metadata.description: Mepụta paleti agba 9 site n'otu agba isi: monochromatic, complementary, triadic, pastel na ndị ọzọ. Detuo HEX n'otu pịa.

hero.title: Onye emepụta paleti agba
hero.description: Tinye otu agba isi, ngwa ọrụ ahụ ga-emepụta paleti agba 9 kwekọrọ: monochromatic, complementary, triadic, pastel, na ndị ọzọ. Ị nwere ike idetuo agba ọ bụla nwere koodu HEX ya.

software.name: Onye emepụta paleti agba
software.description: Onye emepụta paleti agba n'efu. Tinye otu agba HEX, ngwa ọrụ ahụ ga-emepụta usoro 9: monochromatic, analogous, complementary, triadic, split-complementary, pastel, dark, tonal, na minimalist. Ị nwere ike idetuo agba ọ bụla nwere koodu HEX na uru HSL.
featureList: Usoro monochromatic - ụdị nke otu agba
Usoro analogous - agba dị nso na kịkịl agba
Usoro triadic - agba 3 na oghere nhata
Usoro split-complementary - agba isi na 2 ndị dị nso na nke gbagwojuru anya
Paleti pastel - agba dị nro, rụrụ arụ
Paleti ojii - agba miri emi maka isiokwu ojii
Paleti tonal - ọkwa ìhè nke otu agba
Paleti minimalist - agba siri ike na agba dị nro
Agba mbụ na-enweghị agbanwe maka ibido
Uru HSL pụtara n'akụkụ agba ọ bụla

howTo.name: Otu esi emepụta paleti agba site n'otu agba isi
howTo.description: Otu esi emepụta paleti agba 9 site n'otu agba isi: monochromatic, complementary, triadic, pastel, na ndị ọzọ. Ị nwere ike idetuo agba ọ bụla nwere koodu HEX ya.

steps.name: Họrọ agba isi
steps.text: Tinye koodu HEX n'ubi ederede ma ọ bụ jiri nhọpụta agba họrọ agba n'ụdị.

steps.name: Kwado agba ahụ
steps.text: Kwado agba ị họrọrọ site na bọtịnụ Update Color — ngwa ọrụ ahụ ga-emepụta paleti dabere na agba isi gị.

steps.name: Lee paleti ndị ahụ
steps.text: Ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-emepụta paleti 9 dị iche iche na-akpaghị aka: monochromatic, analogous, complementary, triadic, split-complementary, pastel, dark, tonal, na minimalist.

steps.name: Detuo agba ndị ahụ
steps.text: N'akụkụ agba ọ bụla bọtịnụ Copy dị — koodu HEX na-aga gaa clipboard, ị nwekwara ike imado ya ozugbo n'ọrụ gị.

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị mere ị ga-eji mepụta paleti agba?
contentBlocks.html:
Paleti agba kwekọrọ bụ ntọala ọrụ nhazi niile — site na weebụsaịtị, site na akara, ruo ihe ebipụtara. Ịhọrọ agba kwekọrọ n'aka chọrọ ihe ọmụma gbasara amamihe agba. Onye emepụta ahụ na-eme ya na-akpaghị aka: ị na-enye otu agba isi (dịka ọmụmaatụ, agba logo gị), ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-emepụta usoro agba 9 dabere na usoro nhata agba amụmamụ.

Agba ọ bụla emepụtara na-abịa nwere koodu HEX ya (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #4F6BF5) na uru HSL (hue, saturation, lightness). Ị nwere ike imado koodu HEX ozugbo na CSS, Figma, Canva, ma ọ bụ ngwa onyonyo ọ bụla.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi eji onye emepụta paleti agba
contentBlocks.description: Usoro niile na-ewe naanị nkeji ole na ole:

items.title: 1. Tinye agba isi
items.description: Tinye koodu HEX (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #4F6BF5) n'ubi ederede ma ọ bụ họrọ agba site na nhọpụta agba. Ị nwekwara ike iji bọtịnụ Random Color.

items.title: 2. Kwado nhọrọ gị
items.description: Mgbe ịpịchara bọtịnụ Update Color, ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-emepụta paleti 9 na-akpaghị aka dabere na usoro nhata agba dị iche iche.

items.title: 3. Detuo agba ị chọrọ
items.description: N'akụkụ agba ọ bụla bọtịnụ Copy dị — koodu HEX na-aga gaa clipboard, ị nwekwara ike imado ya ozugbo n'ọrụ gị.

contentBlocks.title: Usoro agba ole ka ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-emepụta?
contentBlocks.description: Onye emepụta ahụ na-emepụta ụdị paleti 9 — nke ọ bụla dabere na ụkpụrụ amamihe agba dị iche:

items.title: Paleti monochromatic
items.description: Ụdị nke otu agba — site na nke dị ìhè ruo nke ojii. Agba niile nwere otu hue na kịkịl agba, ha na-adị iche naanị na ìhè. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma na nhazi eleganti, minimalist ebe ịha nhata dị mkpa.

items.title: Paleti analogous
items.description: Agba dị nso na kịkịl agba (ntụgharị ihe dịka 30° n'akụkụ abụọ site n'isi). Ha na-emepụta mgbanwe agba kwekọrọ, dị nro. Ọ dị mma maka ọrụ na-ewu ikuku dị ọkụ ma ọ bụ oyi.

items.title: Paleti complementary
items.description: Agba isi na agba gbagwojuru anya na kịkịl agba (ntụgharị 180°). Ọ na-emepụta ọdịiche nhazi siri ike. Ọ bara uru ebe achọrọ ka ihe dọta anya — bọtịnụ, aha akwụkwọ, ọkọlọtọ mgbasa ozi.

items.title: Paleti triadic
items.description: Agba atọ nwere oghere 120° n'etiti ha na kịkịl agba — na-emepụta triangle nhata. Njikọta siri ike, dị iche iche. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma na ọrụ ịke: ịmata akara azụmaahịa, ihe mgbasa ozi, akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi.

items.title: Paleti split-complementary
items.description: Ụdị dị nro nke paleti complementary. Kama otu agba gbagwojuru anya, ọ na-eji agba abụọ ntụgharịrị ihe dịka 30° site na complement. Ọ na-enye ọdịiche a na-ahụ anya ma na-enweghị ịdị ike nhazi.

items.title: Paleti pastel
items.description: Otu hue nwere saturation belataara na lightness abawanyere — agba dị nro, na-atọ ụtọ. A ma ama na mma, uwe ụmụaka, na ụlọ ọrụ nri. Ọ dabara na ndabere dị ìhè na oghere ọcha.

items.title: Paleti ojii
items.description: Agba isi nwere saturation dị elu na lightness belataara — agba miri emi, siri ike. Ọ bara uru maka nhazi isiokwu ojii maka weebụsaịtị na ngwa, yana ihe maka akara dị elu.

items.title: Paleti tonal
items.description: Ọtụtụ nzọụkwụ ìhè nke otu hue — site na nke dị ìhè nke ọma ruo ojii. Ọ yiri ọkwa tonal a na-eji na usoro nhazi (dịka ọmụmaatụ, ụdị site na 50 ruo 900). Ọ bara uru maka iwu interface ebe otu agba chọrọ ụdị.

items.title: Paleti minimalist
items.description: Otu ọdịiche agba siri ike na ọtụtụ agba dị ìhè nke nro. Paleti ndị fọdụrụ dị jụụ. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma na interface ọgbara ọhụrụ nwere oghere ọcha ọtụtụ — nhazi peeji ngwaahịa na landing page.

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị ka onye emepụta paleti agba dabere na ya?
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
H (hue)0°–360° na kịkịl agba
S (saturation)0%–100%
L (lightness)0%–100%
contentBlocks.html:
A na-emepụta paleti niile site na ịtụgharị agba isi n'ụzọ ọtụtụ na oghere agba HSL. HSL na-akọwa agba site n'uru atọ: hue (H) bụ ọnọdụ na kịkịl agba (0°–360°), saturation (S) na-ekpebi otu agba ahụ si dị ike, na lightness (L) — otu agba ahụ si dị ìhè ma ọ bụ ojii.

Paleti complementary, triadic, na split-complementary dabere na geometry kịkịl agba — a na-edobe agba n'oghere akụkụ nhata, na-emepụta ịha nhata nhazi. Paleti monochromatic, pastel, na ojii na-agbanwe naanị lightness na saturation mgbe ha na-eji otu hue.

contentBlocks.title: Ebee ka ị nwere ike iji paleti agba emepụtara

items.title: Ịmata anya nhazi akara azụmaahịa
items.description: Họrọ agba kwekọrọ na logo dị adị ma ọ bụ wuo paleti akara azụmaahịa site na mbido — maka kaadị azụmaahịa, ihe edere ihe, na ihe mgbasa ozi.

items.title: Weebụsaịtị
items.description: Tọọ agba isi, agba mmetụta, na ụdị ndabere. Ị nwere ike imado koodu HEX edetuora ozugbo na CSS ma ọ bụ usoro isiokwu.

items.title: Interface ngwa
items.description: Paleti tonal na-enye ụdị ìhè nke otu agba — nke dị ìhè maka ndabere, ojii maka ederede, etiti maka ókè na ọnọdụ mmekọrịta.

items.title: Onyonyo mmekọrịta
items.description: Agba kwekọrọ maka ederede, stories, na mkpuchi profaịlụ. Paleti analogous ma ọ bụ pastel na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma mgbe ị chọrọ otu ụdị a maara.

items.title: Ngosi na akwụkwọ
items.description: Usoro agba kwekọrọ maka slides, eserese data, na infographics. Paleti monochromatic ma ọ bụ minimalist na-etinye usoro nhazi.

items.title: Paleti agbanweghị mgbe itinyechara agba
items.description: Itinye koodu HEX naanị anaghị emepụta paleti na-akpaghị aka — ị kwesịrị ikwado mgbanwe ahụ site na bọtịnụ Update Color. Naanị mgbe ikwadochara ka ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-emelite usoro 9 niile.

items.title: Ozi usoro na-ezighị ezi
items.description: Onye emepụta ahụ na-anabata naanị usoro HEX nwere # na mbido, dịka ọmụmaatụ, #FF5500. Usoro na-enweghị # (dịka ọmụmaatụ, FF5500) ma ọ bụ na usoro RGB (dịka ọmụmaatụ, rgb(255,85,0)) enweghị nkwado.

items.title: Usoro HEX mkpụmkpụ na zuru ezu
items.description: A na-akwado usoro abụọ: zuru ezu #RRGGBB (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #FF5500) na mkpụmkpụ #RGB (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #F50). Onye emepụta ahụ na-amata ha abụọ na-akpaghị aka ma na-ejikwa ha otu ahụ.

contentBlocks.title: Ajụjụ a na-ajụkarị gbasara onye emepụta paleti agba

items.question: Usoro ole ka agba isi kwesịrị ịdị?
items.answer: Onye emepụta ahụ na-anabata agba na usoro HEX — ma mkpụmkpụ (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #F50) ma zuru ezu (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #FF5500). N'akụkụ ubi ederede ị ga-ahụ nhọpụta agba nke na-enye gị ohere ịhọrọ agba n'ụdị. Paleti emepụtara na-egosi koodu HEX na uru HSL nke agba ọ bụla.
items.answerSchemaText: Onye emepụta ahụ na-anabata agba HEX (#RGB ma ọ bụ #RRGGBB). Agba ọ bụla emepụtara nwere koodu HEX na uru HSL.

items.question: Ole agba ka paleti ọ bụla nwere?
items.answer: Paleti ọ bụla nwere agba 4 ruo 6. Ọnụọgụ dabere na ụdị usoro — paleti monochromatic na tonal na-emepụta ụdị karịa (ọkwa ìhè nke otu hue), ma paleti complementary na triadic na-anọchi anya agba ole na ole dị iche.
items.answerSchemaText: Paleti ọ bụla nwere agba 4 ruo 6, dabere na ụdị usoro.

items.question: Gịnị bụ oghere agba HSL na kedu ka a ga-esi gụọ ya?
items.answer: HSL bụ ụzọ ịkọwa agba site n'uru atọ: H (hue, 0°–360° na kịkịl agba), S (saturation, 0%–100%), na L (lightness, 0%–100%). Onye emepụta ahụ na-egosi uru HSL n'akụkụ agba ọ bụla, nke na-eme ka ọ dị mfe ịghọta otu agba na paleti si adị iche — dịka ọmụmaatụ, paleti monochromatic na-agbanwe naanị lightness (L) mgbe ọ na-eji otu hue (H).
items.answerSchemaText: HSL na-akọwa agba site na hue (H), saturation (S), na lightness (L). Onye emepụta ahụ na-egosi uru ndị a n'akụkụ agba ọ bụla.

items.question: Enwere m ike iji paleti emepụtara maka ọrụ azụmaahịa?
items.answer: Ee. Ị nwere ike iji paleti agba emepụtara n'ọrụ ọ bụla — azụmaahịa na nke abụghị azụmaahịa, na-enweghị oke ikike.
items.answerSchemaText: Ee, ị nwere ike iji paleti emepụtara na-enweghị oke na ọrụ azụmaahịa na nke abụghị azụmaahịa.

items.question: Onye emepụta paleti agba ọ chọrọ nbanye ma ọ bụ ịkwụ ụgwọ?
items.answer: Onye emepụta ahụ bụ n'efu kpamkpam, ọ chọghịkwa nbanye ma ọ bụ ndebanye aha. A na-emepụta agba n'ime ihe nchọgharị — enweghị data a na-eziga gaa sava mpụga.
items.answerSchemaText: Onye emepụta ahụ bụ n'efu, ọ chọghị nbanye. A na-emepụta agba n'ime ihe nchọgharị.
